testimonials.text: Randy helped us purchase our dream home and sold our current home in record time. His guidance and market expertise made the selling experience very positive. I would highly recommend Randy as a real estate agent.

Working with Randy was a pleasure. He helped us find a beautiful condo for our daughter. He knows the market and Mississauga area very well, is always on time to appointments, and returns calls or emails very quickly.

Randy is a pleasure to work with. He helped clients sell their home quickly and for top dollar, found them a new home in a different city, and was fast and efficient in getting documentation completed.
